action.reasoning: Observation: New best 0.0876 from epoch 13 of recent run (val 0.0730 → test 0.0876). Time: 0.51h, 6 iters left. Best.pt was saved at epoch 13 of latest run, and we have last.pt from epoch 39 with val ~0.06. Val/test gap was favorable this time. Training continues to improve. Decision: Train ~20 more epochs from current best with lower LR to refine, time-limit ~1500s to leave buffer for eval submission.
action.command: cd /workspace && python train2.py --epochs 20 --resume checkpoints/best.pt --lr 5e-5 --time_limit 1500 --out_best checkpoints/best.pt --out_last checkpoints/last.pt
